levels.name: First Step
levels.hint: Move forward once to reach the food.

levels.name: Straight Ahead
levels.hint: Keep moving in the same direction until you arrive.

levels.name: Upward Path
levels.hint: Forward works vertically too. Climb to the goal.

levels.name: Tall Climb
levels.hint: Stay on the same line and walk all the way up.

levels.name: Downward Trail
levels.hint: Face down and follow the column to the food.

levels.name: First Turn
levels.hint: Rotate before moving so the path lines up.

levels.name: Turn And Go
levels.hint: One turn sets the route. Then keep walking.

levels.name: Corner Reach
levels.hint: Use a turn to reach the far corner.

levels.name: Two Turns
levels.hint: This route needs more than one rotation.

levels.name: Top Shelf
levels.hint: Turn carefully and work your way to the upper goal.

levels.name: Turnaround
levels.hint: The food is not in front of you, so reorient first.

levels.name: Open Route
levels.hint: Movement and rotation together can solve the whole board.

levels.name: First Wall
levels.hint: Walls cannot be crossed, so find the way around.

levels.name: L-Corner
levels.hint: The direct path is closed by a small corner wall.

levels.name: Narrow Gate
levels.hint: Look for the opening and pass through it.

levels.name: Wall Hugger
levels.hint: Following the edge is the safest way through.

levels.name: Small Maze
levels.hint: A short detour is enough if you plan the turns.

levels.name: Cross Corridor
levels.hint: The middle is blocked. Use the open corridor instead.

levels.name: Side Route
levels.hint: The center is closed, so the answer is on the side.

levels.name: Find The Opening
levels.hint: Read the board carefully and route around the walls.

levels.name: First Jump
levels.hint: Jump over the hole and land on a safe tile.

levels.name: Jump Lane
levels.hint: This level is all about lining up a clean jump.

levels.name: Leap And Turn
levels.hint: Jump first, then rotate to finish the path.

levels.name: Double Gap
levels.hint: You need two separate jumps to complete this route.

levels.name: Upper Bridge
levels.hint: Rotate into place, then jump across the gap.

levels.name: Safe Landing
levels.hint: Plan the jump so you land on an open cell.

levels.name: Across The Gap
levels.hint: The hole changes the route, but the goal is still reachable.

levels.name: Split Route
levels.hint: Walls and holes divide the board into sections.

levels.name: Two Treats
levels.hint: You only win after collecting both foods.

levels.name: Three Stops
levels.hint: There are three foods, so the order matters now.

levels.name: Leap For Lunch
levels.hint: Jump to one food first, then continue to the next.

levels.name: Corner Cleanup
levels.hint: Collect both foods before you run out of space.

levels.name: Five Crumbs
levels.hint: A longer route is fine as long as you collect them all.

levels.name: Crumb Circuit
levels.hint: Build a route that clears every food on the board.

levels.name: Snack Sweep
levels.hint: You need a full collection route, not just the shortest path.

levels.name: Full Plate
levels.hint: Plan a clean path that picks up every last food.

levels.name: First Break
levels.hint: Break the obstacle in front of you before moving on.

levels.name: Break And Turn
levels.hint: Open the path, then rotate toward the food.

levels.name: Double Break
levels.hint: Two breakable blocks stand between you and the goal.

levels.name: Break For Both
levels.hint: Break the barrier, then collect both foods.

levels.name: Break Then Jump
levels.hint: Break first, then line up the jump across the hole.

levels.name: Cracked Maze
levels.hint: Some obstacles must be avoided, but one must be broken.

levels.name: Cracked Maze II
levels.hint: Break the right wall and remember to use the jump.

levels.name: Cracked Maze III
levels.hint: Breaking and jumping both matter if you want every food.

levels.name: Cracked Maze IV
levels.hint: This route mixes breakables, gaps, and a full food clear.

levels.name: Red Switch
levels.hint: Step on the switch to open the matching gate.

levels.name: Switch Pressure
levels.hint: Use the switch at the right moment to open the route.

levels.name: Switchback Path
levels.hint: Trigger the gate, then come back through the new opening.

levels.name: Switchback Loop
levels.hint: Hit the switch, loop around, and use the opened path.

levels.name: Switchback Harvest
levels.hint: Open the route, then collect both foods before leaving.

levels.name: Gatekeeper
levels.hint: One switch can control an entire gate.

levels.name: Switch, Jump, Snack
levels.hint: Open the gate, then combine jumping and collection.

levels.name: Switch, Jump, Snack II
levels.hint: The gate is only part of the solution. The rest is route planning.

levels.name: Two Colors
levels.hint: Each switch opens a different color gate.

levels.name: Twin Gates
levels.hint: Open one gate, then the other, to reach the end.

levels.name: Master Route
levels.hint: Use every core mechanic to clear the board.

levels.name: Master Route II
levels.hint: This puzzle asks for a cleaner plan across all mechanics.

levels.name: Triple Gate
levels.hint: Three gate groups turn this board into a timing puzzle.

levels.name: Triple Gate Harvest
levels.hint: Manage the gates carefully while collecting both foods.

levels.name: Final Delivery
levels.hint: Break, jump, switch gates, and collect both foods to finish the set.
